Purge

Mass deletes a specific amount of messages from a channel. Messages older than 2 weeks are ignored. Count must be between 2 and 99. Optional filters can be applied after the count:
+user/+u @aegis -> Message Author
`+string/+s \

Category: Moderation Required Permissions: MANAGE_MESSAGES

Usage

+purge <count: Number> ...[filters]

Examples

+purge 5 +user @aegis
